chapter_title.en: Punishment of enmity with Amirul Momineen (a.s.) and denying or doubting his Wilayat

text: وَ بِهَذَا الْإِسْنَادِ عَنْ حَنَانِ بْنِ سَدِیرٍ قَالَ سَمِعْنَا أَبَا جَعْفَرٍ ع یَقُولُ إِنَّ عَدُوَّ عَلِیٍّ ع لَا یَخْرُجُ مِنَ الدُّنْیَا حَتَّی یَجْرَعَ جُرْعَهً مِنَ الْجَحِیمِ وَ قَالَ سَوَاءٌ عَلَی مَنْ خَالَفَ هَذَا الْأَمْرَ صَلَّی أَمْ صَامَ.

en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs: 17.  It is narrated that Imam Muhammad Baqir (a.s.) said, “As soon as the enemy of Ali (a.s.) passes away from this world, he is made to drink a gulp of the boiling water of Hell. For one  who  is  inimical  to  Ali  (a.s.)  there  is  no  difference whether he is a worshipper or a fornicator.”
